skill.name: maxhub-xigua
skill.description: Xigua (Watermelon Video) data query assistant. Covers video details, user data, search, comments, and more.
skill.summary: Query Xigua video platform data using natural language through the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 133 potential issues across 6 files. After evaluation, all findings are dismissed as false positives or benign in context. The skill is a legitimate API client for Xigua Video (Watermelon Video) data querying via the MaxHub API. Hardcoded URLs point to the legitimate API endpoint at aconfig.cn. Shell command patterns exist only in markdown documentation code blocks (curl examples, installation commands). Environment variable access (MAXHUB_API_KEY) is a legitimate requirement for API authentication with proper credential handling instructions. Base64 encoding in API reference docs is data transmission encoding, not cryptographic weakness. The high-entropy heuristic is triggered by bilingual Chinese/English documentation, not obfuscation.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs in documentation
low_findings.description: Static analysis detected 19 hardcoded URLs pointing to www.aconfig.cn. These are legitimate references to the MaxHub API endpoint used by this skill. All URLs are in documentation, configuration, and SKILL.md metadata. No evidence of data exfiltration or malicious endpoints. FALSE POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to a single legitimate API service (aconfig.cn). No obfuscated or suspicious domains detected.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in documentation
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged 57 instances of shell backtick execution patterns. All occur within markdown code blocks in README files, SKILL.md, and API reference documentation. These are curl command examples and installation instructions for users to copy. No dynamic command execution or command injection vectors exist. FALSE POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every shell command is inside a markdown code block as an example. No user-controlled input is passed to any command.

low_findings.title: Environment variable access for API key
low_findings.description: Static analysis detected 15 references to MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable. This is a legitimate requirement for this API client skill. The skill explicitly documents the need for an API key and includes credential handling guidance. The SKILL.md line 159 instructs to keep API key values out of output.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key env access is an intentional and documented requirement. The skill includes proper disclosure and handling guidance. No exfiltration pattern detected.

low_findings.title: Base64 encoding flagged as weak cryptographic algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged Base64 encoding references in api-video-user.md as weak cryptographic algorithm. Base64 is not a cryptographic algorithm but a data encoding scheme used for video URL transmission. The API returns Base64-encoded play URLs that are decoded before use. FALSE POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Base64 is a data encoding scheme, not a cryptographic algorithm. It is used for video play URL transmission, consistent with the API documentation.

low_findings.title: System reconnaissance patterns in API documentation
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged 18 instances of system reconnaissance in api-video-user.md and param-mappings.md. These are API endpoint documentation entries describing parameters, paths, and usage instructions. Standard reference documentation for an API client skill. FALSE POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All flagged lines contain API parameter documentation such as endpoint paths and parameter descriptions. Standard documentation, not reconnaissance.

low_findings.title: High file entropy heuristic on bilingual document
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged README_CN.md for high file entropy (6.02 bits), suggesting possible binary or encrypted content. The file is a bilingual Chinese-English markdown document. Chinese characters naturally produce higher entropy in byte-level analysis. FALSE POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file is a standard markdown document with Chinese text. High entropy is a known artifact of multi-byte Unicode (UTF-8) encoding of CJK characters.

content.user_title: Query Xigua Video Data Using Natural Language
content.value_statement: Content creators and analysts need quick access to Xigua (Watermelon Video) platform data for research. This skill lets you search videos, view user profiles, and analyze comments using simple natural language queries instead of writing API calls.
actual_capabilities: Search Xigua videos by keyword with duration and sorting filters
Fetch detailed video information including titles and statistics
Retrieve user profile data and full post lists
Get video comment lists with pagination support
Fetch video play URLs for direct access
Support bilingual queries in Chinese and English with appropriate number formatting
limitations: Data is limited to what the MaxHub API provides and may not reflect real-time status
Video play URLs may expire and need to be re-fetched for access
Cannot post content, comment, or perform any write actions on Xigua platform
API rate limits may restrict high-frequency or bulk querying

use_cases.title: Content Research and Trend Analysis
use_cases.description: Search and analyze Xigua videos by keyword, duration, and popularity to understand content trends and audience preferences.

use_cases.title: Creator Profile Analysis
use_cases.description: Retrieve user information, post lists, and video performance data to study creator activity on Xigua platform.

use_cases.title: Comment Sentiment Review
use_cases.description: Fetch video comments to gauge audience reaction and engagement levels on specific content pieces.

prompt_templates.title: Search for Videos by Keyword
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - simple keyword search on Xigua platform

prompt_templates.title: Get User Profile and Posts
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the profile and recent posts for Xigua user [user ID]
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - user data lookup and post list retrieval

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Video Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed info and comments for video [video ID] and summarize viewer feedback
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - combined video details and comment analysis

prompt_templates.title: Deep Content Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Xigua for videos about [topic A] and [topic B]. Compare their popularity, view counts, and audience engagement.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - multi-endpoint comparison analysis across topics

output_examples.input: Search Xigua for videos about cooking
output_examples.output:
I found 20 videos matching cooking on Xigua:

1. Easy Home Recipes for Beginners
   - Views: 1.2M
   - Duration: 8:32
   - Author: Chef Wang

2. Quick 5-Minute Meals
   - Views: 856K
   - Duration: 5:15
   - Author: TastyLife

Tip: For more details on a video, share its video ID.

Here are the latest comments for this video:

1. Great tutorial, very easy to follow - 120 likes
2. Can you make a version for beginners - 45 likes
3. I tried this recipe and it was amazing - 89 likes

Total comments: 234 | Page 1 of 12

Shall I load the next page of comments?

best_practices: Prepare your MAXHUB_API_KEY before querying. The skill needs this key to access the MaxHub data API.
Start with broad search terms for discovery, then narrow down using specific video IDs or user IDs for deeper analysis.
Use Chinese keywords for more accurate search results since Xigua primarily serves Chinese-language content.
anti_patterns: Do not share your MAXHUB_API_KEY in prompts or output. The key is sensitive and should remain in your environment configuration only.
Do not assume real-time data. The API may return cached results, so repeated queries for the same resource may not show updates.
Do not scrape large amounts of data rapidly. Respect API rate limits to avoid being temporarily blocked by the service.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a MAXHUB_API_KEY from www.aconfig.cn. Register an account and create an API key in your dashboard.

faq.question: What data can I query with this skill?
faq.answer: You can search videos by keyword, view video details, fetch user profiles and post lists, get video comments, and retrieve play URLs.

faq.question: Does the skill support English or only Chinese?
faq.answer: Both. The skill detects your language and responds accordingly. Chinese responses use wan/yi number format while English uses K/M/B.

faq.question: How do I find a video ID or user ID on Xigua?
faq.answer: Video IDs are in the URL when you open a video. User IDs are on profile pages. Both are numeric strings.

faq.question: Can this skill post content or interact with Xigua accounts?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only. It queries public data through the MaxHub API and cannot post, comment, or modify anything on Xigua.

faq.question: Is the data from this skill real-time?
faq.answer: Data comes from the MaxHub API which may cache results. It is suitable for analysis and research but may not show live status.
